description: Spin-Off and Special-Situations Desk - sources Form 10-12B spin-off registrations from SEC EDGAR, prices and screens them on FMP, scores the post-separation forced-selling and analyst-neglect edge, writes data/spinoff-desk.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Spin-Off Desk - daily 13:20 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler. Scheduler is the go-forward path; the classic 300-rule EventBridge pool is saturated.
